pageContext.name: Kyoka Jiro (Hero Suit Version)
pageContext.description: From My Hero Academia , comes the first three-dimensional hero suit with a cool girl Kyoka Jiro who is a rock enthusiast from the first-grader of U.A. High School. She has the quirk of an earphone jack that attacks with sound waves. In order to express her quirk, Bellfine made a figure with a pedestal with effect parts and American-style character parts.  Sonic effect parts can be removed and you can choose between a cool expression that is her charm and a smiling expression.   Be sure to add this cool girl collectible figure to your collection today!
